positive: A minimalist, geometric depiction of a stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune), rendered in solid, high-contrast silhouette. The fox should be sitting regally, surrounded by abstract geometric representations of stars, moons, and comets. The color palette should be deep navy blue, indigo, vibrant magenta, and shimmering gold accents, giving it an ethereal, yet modern, vaporwave aesthetic. Composition should be central and balanced, designed for apparel printing. Vector art style, clean lines, negative space utilization, flat graphic design, suitable for DTG printing. Cinematic lighting, high detail, crisp edges.
